Takumi Systems K.K. — Data Processing Addendum Schedule and Privacy Workflow Note (APPI/FIEA context)
Scope: employee onboarding forms, issuer board support records, and post-acquisition integration of Hato Solutions K.K.; this schedule supplements the master services agreement with processors.
Categories: HR profiles, work contact details, and limited director registry items for filings; no My Number is used in securities or investor-relations workflows.
My Number (個人番号): stored in a segregated payroll vault, collected only for statutory purposes, not combined with other identifiers, and not exported; deletion follows completion of statutory retention.
Data minimisation: onboarding forms collect only required fields (examples: Name (kana), Department Code, Start Date, DummyID: XXX-YYY-ZZZ), and optional fields are clearly marked.
Transfers: no ongoing cross-border transfers of HR master data; policy prohibits exporting individual codes, including My Number, in capital-markets contexts.
One-time cross-border transfer approval was granted on 2026-05-10 for anonymised employee engagement metrics to Orion Analytics Pte. Ltd. (processor), subject to contractual safeguards and a transfer impact assessment consistent with APPI guidelines.
DSAR status: zero open requests as of month-end; one access request was completed on 2026-04-22 after identity verification; no erasure requests were received in Q2.
Consent management: there are no pending consent withdrawals for optional benefits; historical opt-outs are logged and applied to internal newsletters only.
Retention: recruiting records 3 years; payroll/tax 7 years; board materials containing personal data 10 years per internal policy; automated erasure timers were validated in April and are functioning as designed.
Securities/MNPI: this note does not include undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer facts under FIEA; the acquisition of Hato Solutions K.K. was publicly announced on 2026-03-15, and no tender offer is contemplated.
Issuer filings to the Hinode Securities Exchange use only aggregated headcount and role counts; no individual codes, special-care data, or My Number are submitted.
Processors: Shinrai Cloud K.K. (hosting) and Blue Kite Research K.K. (survey) each operate under this DPA with subprocessor notification obligations and confidentiality controls.
Data Export Committee record: aside from the approved anonymised metrics export, no other outbound transfers have been authorised this fiscal year, and prior permits have lapsed.
Audit: internal audit item DP-2025-17 on retention labeling was closed; there are no open corrective actions on minimisation or cross-border controls.
Contact: inquiries may be sent to privacy-office@takumi.example; responses are coordinated by the Privacy Officer team and recorded in the DSAR log.
